summary: Russian forces used the ZALA Z-16 UAV to guide FAB-500 bombs in striking a road bridge near Pisantsy in the Dnipropetrovsk region. A Ukrainian drone attack on Novorossiysk Bay hit the middle superstructure of the Russian frigate "Admiral Essen," damaging PK-10 countermeasure launchers and the TK-25 electronic warfare complex. Ukrainian operators conducted FPV strikes over 50 km into occupied Donetsk, targeting military and logistics vehicles. Russian air defense units reported intercepting over 1,500 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, with 75% belonging to 11 specific models. Ukrainian forces employed ZALA Lancet loitering munitions to strike group targets despite active electronic warfare interference.
